channel.title: Basketball Events & Tournaments on India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy
channel.description: Recent content in Basketball Events & Tournaments on India's #1 Basketball Training Academy | IB Sports Academy

item.title: Inter IB 3.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The third edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.

item.title: Inter IB 4.0 • IB Sports Academy
item.description: The fourth edition of the Inter IB tournament brought together IB athletes for one of the most competitive in-house basketball events organized by IB Sports Academy.
